content: MEI mandatory obligations: (1) Monthly DAS by day 20 - INSS (5% of minimum wage) + ICMS R$1 if commerce + ISS R$5 if services. 2026 total: R$81.05-R$87.05/month. (2) Annual DASN-SIMEI declaration by May 31 - report prior year revenue; late filing = R$50 min fine or 2%/month capped at 20%, blocks new DAS issuance, can lead to CNPJ cancellation. (3) Monthly revenue log (Relatório de Receitas Brutas) - must keep 5 years, not submitted to anyone. (4) Keep all invoices (purchase and sales) for 5 years. Revenue limit: R$81,000/year (~R$6,750/month reference).
